src/api/routes.py:18068:def apply_mono_maker(audio_data, intensity):
src/api/routes.py:18070:    if len(audio_data.shape) < 2:
src/api/routes.py:18071:        return audio_data  # Already mono
src/api/routes.py:18073:    mono_mix = (intensity / 100.0)  # 0 to 1

src/api/routes.py:18075:    mono = np.mean(audio_data, axis=1, keepdims=True)
src/api/routes.py:18078:    return stereo * (1 - mono_mix) + mono * mono_mix
